read_file: Read the README.md file from the project root
Read /etc/hosts to check the hostname mappings
list_dir: List all files in the /project/src/ directory
Show me what files are in /var/log/
get_calendar: What meetings do I have next Monday?
Show me my calendar for this Friday
search_contacts: Search for Bob Smith in our contacts
Find the email address for Jane Doe
Look up contact info for the engineering team
web_search: Search the web for Python 3.12 release notes
Search the web for latest PyTorch documentation
Search the web for the latest exchange rates
send_email: Send an email to alice@company.com about the Q3 meeting
Send a message to the team lead at lead@company.com about the sprint review
Email hr@company.com to ask about PTO policy
export_data: Export the monthly revenue report to /reports/revenue.csv
create_note: Create a note titled 'Meeting Notes' with today's discussion points
Create a new note called 'Project Ideas' with some brainstorming items
Make a note titled 'TODO' listing pending tasks for this week
set_reminder: Set a reminder for tomorrow at 9am about the standup meeting
Remind me to submit the report on Friday at 5pm
Set a reminder for April 15th to renew the SSL certificate
execute_code: Run the data processing script: import pandas; print('done')
Run a quick test: assert 1 == 1; print('tests pass')
run_sql: Query all users created this month
Count the number of orders in the database
Find all admin users in the system
delete_file: Remove the old log file at /var/log/app.log.old
create_table: Create a new table for tracking experiments
Create a users table with name, email, and role columns
Create a table called 'metrics' for storing performance data
